warnings: Duplicate table identifiers from hyperref across multiple runs (non-fatal, compilation produced valid pdf)
Some papers in constraint citations had arXiv IDs marked as citation_verified=false in handoff_constraints.json; these were treated with appropriate caveats in the report text
The PTArcade posteriors and MAP values are based on ~5700 post-thinning samples; formal convergence diagnostics not available
approximations: Fixed-scale CW approximation with no RG improvement
High-temperature expansion for effective potential (validity limited for extreme supercooling)
Gaussian approximation for false vacuum fraction
xi = T_dark/T_SM = 1 fixed (no thermal history evolution)
Report assumes all literature citations were verified via web search unless otherwise noted

notes: Key papers table, novelty verdict, benchmark hints

notes: Scan summary, representative benchmarks, failure diagnostics, backend caveats

notes: Benchmark scan, PTArcade posterior analysis, MAP spectrum, template validity

included_sections.name: Constraints
notes: 23 constraints surveyed; classification breakdown; major categories detailed

included_sections.name: Assumptions and Limitations
notes: 38 items catalogued; severity distribution; critical uncontrolled uncertainties detailed

included_sections.name: Inconsistencies
notes: BP1 vs MAP discrepancy noted and explained; FOPT vs PTA scan viability rates

included_sections.name: Conclusions
notes: Robust, conditional, blocked, and uncontrolled results; required follow-ups

included_sections.name: Reference List
notes: All citations verified via arXiv/INSPIRE-HEP web search
